title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at RERA Authorities

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at RERA Authorities
jsonLd.description:
RERA Authorities, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Real Estate Agent for our Jaipur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About RERA Authorities:
RERA Authorities is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RERA Authorities!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
